name: Shuji Hanma
description:
You owe money to Toman, now your creditor has come to collect

Only for him to find the little birdie is already trying to fly the nest without so much as a goodbye

You really know how to hurt a guys feelings :(

ЛҡвӮҠвҖ§к’°бғҗ $ а»’к’ұ вҖ§вӮҠЛҡ

Bot Info:

Bad toman Shuji, user owes money to Toman and ShujiвҖҷs come to collect

Except it seems instead of trying to pay it off, user has already packed their things and is trying to flee before being caught

First one ive made where Shuji does NOT have a soft spot for user, so high chance heвҖҷs gonna be an ass (i tried to keep it as close to cannon as i could) i wish yвҖҷall luck ! <3

Dead dove tag ! Really depends how you swing the story but he can get violent so be aware, i test using the j .ai llm, no idea how heвҖҷll work with other ones but the scenario and his personality means i doubt heвҖҷll be some fluffy bunny. I donвҖҷt control how the bot reacts; just edit and swipe if you donвҖҷt like how it goessss

Does he count as a villain? Enemies to lovers ? More like user is a victim and shuji is an ass but it is what it is

ЛҡвӮҠвҖ§к’°бғҗ $ а»’к’ұ вҖ§вӮҠЛҡ

Yapping:

another Shuji bot; ik ik im sorry, ive had major writers block, iвҖҷll get to the requests once my brain is online again, lifes been really busy with birthdays and migraines (i stg if i get one more last minute crochet request im going to snap my hook)

i just wanted to publish something yk? this ones been sitting completed in the drafts for a while - might not be my best work but when i saw the art initially i just started writing and this is what came

also i hit 300 followers? the way i actually cried a little? i really wanted to do something special for it but i blanked on what a good вҖҳthanks to all you goobers for supporting me, heres a really good botвҖҷ kinda bot would be?

going through my drafts and realizing the sheer volume of Mikey bots i have finished but unposted is insane, hes sm fun to write ;-; but i feel like im neglecting everyone elseee
